title: ASO Worker Config
description: Configuration for the ASO Worker skill. One config per app product.

app_name.description: Human-readable app name as it appears in the App Store.

app_id.description: Apple App Store numeric ID (from the app's App Store URL).

store.description: Apple App Store country code (e.g. 'us', 'gb', 'de'). Determines which store's keyword data to use.

platform.description: Target platform. Affects keyword search behavior and competitor landscape.

seed_keywords.description: Starting keywords for discovery. The worker expands from these using competitor analysis and suggestions. Use phrases a real user would type to find your app.

problem_domain.description: Plain English description of what problem the app solves. Used to judge keyword semantic relevance. Example: 'alcohol-free living, sobriety tracking, habit tracking for quitting drinking'.

title.description: Current app title as live in the App Store (max 30 chars).

subtitle.description: Current app subtitle as live in the App Store (max 30 chars).

keywords.description: Current keywords field content. Comma-separated, NO spaces after commas. Max 100 chars total. Empty string if not yet set.

current_metadata.description: Snapshot of currently live metadata. The worker updates this after each successful submission.

min_popularity.description: Minimum keyword popularity score. Below this = ghost town (not enough searchers). Default 20.

max_difficulty.description: Maximum keyword difficulty score. Above this = too competitive for your app's authority. Start at 50 for new apps (0 ratings), loosen to 70 as app gains ratings. Default 50.

target_difficulty.description: Ideal difficulty to aim for. Keywords at or below this are 'green zone' easy wins. Default 30.

golden_ratio.description: Golden Ratio thresholds for keyword filtering. Tighten for new apps, loosen as authority grows.

observe_hours.description: How often to pull ranking data (hours). Matches Astro's 24h update cycle.

act_days.description: Days between metadata submissions. Default 14 = review (~1d) + indexing (~3d) + settlement (~7d) + observation (~3d). The agent may self-adjust this based on observed signal quality in results.jsonl — lengthen if signal is noisy, shorten if rankings settle faster than expected.

verify_preliminary_day.description: Day after submission for preliminary ranking check (are new keywords indexing?). Default 5 = ~1d review + ~3d indexing + 1d buffer.

verify_final_day.description: Day after submission for final measurement (did position improve?). Default 10 = rankings should be settled. Agent may increase if deltas are still volatile at measurement time.

preferred_submit_days.description: Best days to submit for fastest App Review (~10h vs ~24h on Fri/Sat).

cadence.description: Cycle timing. Defaults are the fastest viable cadence (review ~1d + indexing ~3d + settlement ~7d + buffer ~3d = 14d). The agent self-adjusts based on observed signal quality — if rankings are still volatile at verify_final_day, the agent should increase it; if they stabilize sooner, the agent can tighten.

autonomy.description: semi-autonomous: worker outputs a report, human approves before submission. fully-autonomous: worker submits directly. Start semi, move to fully after 3+ successful cycles.
